chapter_title.en: Places Where Prayer is Permissable and Where it is Not Permissable

text: 735 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَيُّوبُ بْنُ نُوحٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ - «يَتَنَحَّى عَنِ اَلْجَوَادِّ يَمْنَةً وَ يَسْرَةً وَ يُصَلِّي.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.735 - It was narrated from Imam (as) said, by Ayyub ibn Nuh that He said:
"One should move away from the main roads to the right or to the left and pray."
